prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: combat card illustration
Primary request: a premium dark-fantasy card illustration for an original game called Blood Rogue showing a necromancer wielding bone magic, grave ash, and corpsecraft. Depict the skill "Iron Maiden". Card rules: "Deal 5 damage. Your mercenary deals +8 to this target.". Focus on a cruel curse of iron thorns and pressure sigils fixing a target in place for punishment.
Subject: one centered halo of iron spikes and occult sigils tightening around a marked silhouette, no gore, no torture device.
Style/medium: painterly gothic dark fantasy, mature deckbuilder art.
Composition/framing: vertical 3:4 illustration, strong centered silhouette, dark uncluttered edges, readable inside a small card art window.
Lighting/mood: ritual, hostile, punishing, severe.
Color palette: dead ivory, grave gray, soot black, rust brown, bruised crimson.
Materials/textures: bone shards, torn cloth, rust, ash, smoke, cracked stone.
Constraints: no text, no logo, no frame, no watermark, no modern objects, no crowded battlefield unless the card absolutely requires a wide effect.
Avoid: no cartoon style, no anime, no goofy proportions, no UI overlays, no torture chamber imagery, no gore.
